name: server-ops-assistant
description: Personal server operations assistant — health checks, Docker management, security hardening, log analysis, backup management, and asset inventory for multi-device home lab environments.
descriptionZh: 个人服务器运维助手，覆盖健康巡检、Docker管理、安全加固、日志分析、备份恢复、资产台账六大场景，通过SSH远程管理多台服务器设备。
